ramization.config.title: RAMization Configuration
ramization.config.smartGC.enabled.toolti: Trigger GC only during idle tick windows to avoid mid-tick lag spikes.
ramization.config.smartGC.heapThresholdP: Heap must be at least this full before SmartGC fires.
ramization.config.smartGC.idleTickMs.too: A tick is 'idle' if it completes in fewer ms than this.
ramization.config.smartGC.idleTicksRequi: How many consecutive idle ticks before GC is triggered.
ramization.config.smartGC.cooldownSecond: Minimum seconds between two SmartGC-triggered collections.
ramization.config.interning.resourceLoca: Deduplicate ResourceLocation namespace/path strings. Highly recommended.
ramization.config.interning.nbtKeys.tool: Deduplicate CompoundTag key strings. Saves RAM in entity-heavy worlds.
Maximum unique strings held in the pool. 0 = unlimited.
ramization.config.textureCache.enableTri: Periodically trim stale sprite entries from texture atlases. CLIENT ONLY.
ramization.config.textureCache.trimInter: How often to trim the texture cache.
Log memory saving statistics every 5 minutes.
ramization.config.logging.gcEvents.toolt: Log a message each time SmartGC triggers a collection.
